creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #7)

Hmm, graphics/qgis uses databases/postgis22 for some time now[1]. What you mean is, that databases/postgis22 itself uses the default PostgreSQL, which is 9.4, right?. More to the point, the  post-patch area in the PostGIS port is hardcoded to 9.4, the rest of the port uses the installed PostgreSQL version.


[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/graphics/qgis/Makefile?revision=433310&view=markup#l90
